MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT's Motion for Leave to File Cross-Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

San Francisco Unified School District's motion to file a cross-complaint is granted. There is good cause to allow the filing because: (1) proposed cross-defendant City and County of San Francisco ("CCSF") has been litigating this case and the proposed cross-complaint for indemnity/contribution does not change the tenor of the case; and (2) judicial economy is served by resolving the parties' dispute in one action. CCSF may seek a trial continuance in department 206 if it believes that there is a basis to file a motion for summary judgment/adjudication on the cross-complaint.

Order signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/CK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Set For Trial On Jun-19-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
